Class HandBrakeJob

Sannel.Encoding.Manager.HandBrake

Sannel.Encoding.Manager.HandBrake.dll

Describes an encoding request to HandBrakeCLI.

Properties

AdditionalArgs

Raw extra CLI arguments appended verbatim. Caller is responsible for sanitizing.

public string? AdditionalArgs { get; init; }

Property Value

string

InputPath

Absolute path to the source file.

public required string InputPath { get; init; }

Property Value

string

OutputPath

Absolute path for the output file.

public required string OutputPath { get; init; }

Property Value

string

PresetFilePath

Path to a .json preset file. Takes precedence over PresetName if both are set.

public string? PresetFilePath { get; init; }

Property Value

string

PresetName

HandBrake preset name (e.g. "Fast 1080p30"). Either this or PresetFilePath must be set.

public string? PresetName { get; init; }

Property Value

string
